code-param.param-value: INSERT INTO JF_COMMON_CODE_GROUP (GROUP_CODE, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_DESC, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE) VALUES (?,?,?,?,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
UPDATE JF_COMMON_CODE_GROUP SET DELETE_YN='Y' WHERE GROUP_CODE=?
SELECT GROUP_CODE, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_DESC, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE FROM JF_COMMON_CODE_GROUP WHERE GROUP_CODE=?
SELECT GROUP_CODE, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_DESC, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE FROM JF_COMMON_CODE_GROUP WHERE DELETE_YN='N' OR DELETE_YN IS NULL
UPDATE JF_COMMON_CODE SET COMMON_NAME=?,COMMON_DESC=?,DSC_USER=?,DSC_DATE=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE GROUP_CODE=? AND COMMON_CODE=?
UPDATE JF_COMMON_CODE SET DELETE_YN='Y' WHERE GROUP_CODE=? AND COMMON_CODE=?
INSERT INTO JF_COMMON_CODE (GROUP_CODE, COMMON_CODE, COMMON_NAME, COMMON_DESC, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
SELECT GROUP_CODE||'.'||COMMON_CODE key, GROUP_CODE, COMMON_CODE, COMMON_NAME, COMMON_DESC, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE FROM JF_COMMON_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE=? AND COMMON_CODE=?
SELECT GROUP_CODE||'.'||COMMON_CODE key, GROUP_CODE, COMMON_CODE, COMMON_NAME, COMMON_DESC, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE FROM JF_COMMON_CODE WHERE DELETE_YN='N' OR DELETE_YN IS NULL
